g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the starting point for EDA in the spend prediction project?')
sendPrompt('What distribution analysis do we run on spend and salary?')
sendPrompt('What correlation analysis is useful for spend prediction features?')
sendPrompt('What segment analysis by demographics reveals in EDA?')
sendPrompt('What seasonal and time-based patterns exist in the spend data?')
sendPrompt('How does spend differ across purchase categories?')
sendPrompt('How do we identify high-value vs low-value customer profiles?')
sendPrompt('What demographic features are extracted for the spend prediction model?')
sendPrompt('What geographic features are useful for spend prediction?')
sendPrompt('What behavioural features capture customer buying patterns?')
sendPrompt('What time-based features are engineered for spend prediction?')
sendPrompt('What engineered aggregate features are created from raw columns?')
sendPrompt('How do we select the most important features for the spend model?')
sendPrompt('What does the final feature matrix look like going into model training?')
